observed_result: base_model is xlm-roberta-base; vocab operation is append-only id-preserving
claim_impact: Allows comparison against XLM-R-base rather than a from-scratch tokenizer/model.

requirement: Existing XLM-R vocab ids must be preserved
claim_impact: Main tokenizer satisfies the structural requirement.

requirement: Tokenizer extension should reduce target10 fragmentation
observed_result: avg tokens/word delta=-29.812358%; worst language delta=+1.504758%; chr and oji still worsen; avg single-char ratio delta=+37.402719%
claim_impact: Supports tokenizer-improvement wording only at average target10 level, not uniformly by language or single-char behavior.

requirement: Byte fallback vs character fallback must be compared
observed_result: byte_fallback avg append delta vs base=-30.215948%; char coverage=-29.812358%; byte-minus-char append delta=-0.599816%; byte fallback has append-only implementation limitation
claim_impact: Byte fallback is slightly better in tokenizer metrics but remains ablation-only because SentencePiece BYTE pieces are not faithfully activated by XLM-R add_tokens matching.

observed_result: fvt zero-step dev loss=7.925527; mean=10.910376; random=17.998567; align=8.700895; focus=16.760191
claim_impact: Supports selecting fvt for pilot training, but does not prove downstream superiority over all init methods.

requirement: Full-model MLM continued pretraining should run across seeds
observed_result: fvt seeds 13/17/23 completed both 200-step pilot and replay-safe 1000-step retry; replay-safe final eval loss mean=3.903145
claim_impact: Shows a stronger compute-bounded 3-seed candidate, but still not full Glot500 budget reproduction.

observed_result: effective batch=32 vs Glot500 384; 200-step pilot vs full continued pretraining; materialized mixture vs online sampler; fvt-only training pilot
claim_impact: Prevents broad final positive wording and requires diagnostic/pilot wording.

requirement: Target10 MLM proxy should improve or at least not degrade broadly
observed_result: replay-safe fvt mean loss=5.245928 vs XLM-R 3.472837; 5/10 languages have lower loss than XLM-R; 10/10 improve vs 200-step fvt
claim_impact: Replay-safe retry improves the failed pilot but still does not beat XLM-R broadly on target10 MLM proxy.

observed_result: replay-safe token accuracy improves by +0.006781 mean and 3/3 checkpoint seeds; macro F1 delta is -0.002656
claim_impact: Supports narrow Coptic token-accuracy improvement, but macro F1 and target10-wide downstream remain insufficient.

requirement: Target10 proxy downstream should be stable across seeds
observed_result: verse retrieval mean delta=+0.000593 with 2/3 positive seeds; parallel AUC mean delta=-0.000649 with 1/3 positive seeds
claim_impact: Proxy downstream evidence is too mixed for positive target10 wording.

observed_result: replay-safe mean high-resource loss delta=+0.675539 vs XLM-R; languages_without_large_collapse=0/4; max language delta=+0.764262
claim_impact: Positive claim remains blocked by high-resource control proxy failure even after lower-LR retry.

requirement: Retained checkpoint selection should be checked before blaming the final checkpoint only
observed_result: checkpoint-150 is worse than checkpoint-200 on target10 MLM proxy and high-resource control proxy; both have 0/4 no-large-collapse languages
claim_impact: Available retained earlier checkpoint selection does not rescue the current candidate.

requirement: Downstream task coverage must include target10 including Coptic/Syriac
observed_result: only Coptic has a locally confirmed official-style supervised task; Syriac has proxy/legacy parallel coverage only
claim_impact: Target10 downstream claim cannot be proven with current local official tasks.

requirement: Coptic/Syriac must be explicit in the target10 claim audit
observed_result: Coptic has weak POS token-accuracy gain but bad MLM proxy; Syriac has strong tokenizer gain but proxy-only model evidence and bad MLM proxy
claim_impact: Supports inclusion of both languages in the diagnostic claim while blocking wording that both improved downstream.

requirement: Retry schedule should be checked before closing the failure as only a short-pilot artifact
observed_result: replay-safe retry improves Stage05 dev loss, target10 MLM proxy, and Coptic POS token accuracy, but high-resource control remains 0/4 no-large-collapse and target10 supervised coverage remains sparse
claim_impact: Strengthens the diagnostic negative claim: more conservative training reduces but does not remove the failure mode.

requirement: Target10 downstream improvement should hold across at least 3 seeds
claim_impact: Positive claim requiring target10 seed-stable downstream improvement is not satisfied.

requirement: Choose positive or diagnostic negative claim
observed_result: positive route blocked by MLM proxy, high-resource control, task coverage, and protocol deviations; diagnostic route supported by tokenizer/ablation/failure evidence
claim_impact: Allowed final wording should be diagnostic for the current candidate, with full-budget limitations stated.
